title: Immigration Law Firm | Houston and Austin, TX | Foster LLP
content:
## Immigration Law Firm Serving Houston and Austin TX

## Some firms are just plain BIG • At Foster, we’re big on YOU
For over 50 years, Foster LLP has been proud to be one of the leading immigration law firms of choice for employers, families, and individuals worldwide. With local offices in Austin and Houston, TX , our experienced and compassionate immigration lawyers are standing by to assist with all manners of immigration law.
Unfortunately, immigration law is complex which can be quite daunting and stressful for many individuals and families looking to pursue their dreams. Our licensed immigration lawyers take the time to understand our clients’ specific needs to help them navigate the process. Whether you are seeking an H-1B visa or EB-5 visa, need help filing a green card application or are simply curious about the current U.S. citizenship requirements, we welcome you to reach out to one of our offices in the Texas region.
As a knowledgeable business immigration lawyer, our firm can provide corporations in a wide range of industries with valuable resources and global immigration service offerings. From ensuring your business follows U.S. and global immigration compliance to helping you obtain proper work visas; our team is here every step of the process.
If you are interested in learning more about our services or if you’d like to schedule a consult with a member of our team, please feel free to contact us today. We look forward to meeting you and helping you achieve your goals.

## Why Work With Our Immigration Lawyers?
Working with an immigration lawyer can make it much easier to navigate the complex and ever-changing field of immigration law. Here are some key advantages of hiring an immigration lawyer:
- Expertise and Knowledge: Immigration law can be intricate and confusing. Our team specializes in this area of practice and has in-depth knowledge of the immigration system. We stay updated on any changes in immigration policies, procedures, and case law, ensuring that you receive accurate and current advice at every point.
- Personalized Guidance: Each immigration case is unique, and an immigration lawyer can provide personalized guidance tailored to your specific circumstances. We will assess your situation, help you understand your options, and develop a strategy to help you achieve your immigration goals.
- Application Preparation: Immigration applications require meticulous attention to detail. An immigration lawyer can assist you in preparing and submitting your application, ensuring that all necessary documents are included, forms are completed accurately, and deadlines are met. This reduces the risk of errors or omissions that could lead to delays or even denials. We can also help you appeal a decision if your application has been denied.
- Legal Representation: If your case requires attending hearings, interviews, or court proceedings, an immigration lawyer can provide legal representation. We will advocate for your rights and interests and confidently address any legal challenges that may arise.
- Increased Chances of Success: While the immigration process might feel overwhelming for you, our immigration law firm deals with this topic every day. Taking advantage of our experience and knowledge can significantly increase your chances of obtaining a favorable outcome.
- Peace of Mind: Dealing with immigration matters can be stressful and overwhelming. By working with our immigration lawyers, you can have peace of mind knowing that you have a knowledgeable professional guiding you through every step of the process.
When you choose to work with Foster LLP, you can trust that you’ll be taking advantage of years of experience and study. Our immigration law firm has been practicing in the Houston and Austin ,areas for decades, helping represent individuals, families, and businesses as they pursue their goals. Are you ready to learn more? Reach out to us today to schedule a consultation!
Personalized immigration services for businesses, families, and individuals since 1973.

## Awards & Recognitions
Through decades of leadership, we have received innumerable recognitions for our strategic work in the field of International Immigration Law.

## Community Service & Advocacy
We are committed to helping our local communities thrive. Whether through philanthropic donations, volunteering our time, or providing pro bono legal services, our attorneys work tirelessly to make a difference.
